case_title: GONZALEZ, DANIEL VS LEBRANCHOGG, ALICIA TERESA

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GONZALEZ, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT LEBRANCHOGG, ALICIA TERESA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEBRANCHOGG, ALICIA TERESA $4,233.81 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,318.81, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT IT WAS MORE LIKELY THAN NOT, BASED ON THE DAMAGE AND MOVEMENT OF THE CARS THAT PLAINTIFF WAS PASSING DEFENDANT ON LEFT CROSSING DOUBLE YELLOW LINE, WHEN DEFENDANT BEGAN AN ILLEGAL U-TURN. 75% FAULT TO PLAINTIFF AND 25% FAULT TO DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEBRANCHOGG, ALICIA TERESA $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $75.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAIL TO ALICIANTERESA LEBRANCHOGG RETURNED SIGNED.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT LEBRANCHOGG, ALICIA TERESA
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 28202, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
